name: Angled Round Glass Vase - Threshold™: Watertight Decor, Hand Wash, Tabletop Display, 5.9" Height
description:
Give your decor a new minimalistic look with this Angled Round Glass Vase from Threshold™. This stylish glass vase features an angled round shape in a clear finish for a unique look that goes with any setting. This watertight vase looks great as a stand-alone piece or filled with stones and botanicals. Place it on your mantelpiece, console table or sideboard in your living room, entryway or lobby with other accent pieces, and hand wash for easy care.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
